transcript: Speaker A: ನನಗೆ ಟೊಮೆಟೊ ರೇಟ್ ಕೇಳಬೇಕು, ಇದನ್ನ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಹೇಗೆ ಕೇಳ್ತಾರೆ? [I want to ask the price of tomatoes, how do they ask this in English?] Speaker B: Say, "What is the price of tomatoes today?" Speaker A: ಓಹ್, ಓಕೆ. What is the price of tomatoes today? [Oh, okay. What is the price of tomatoes today?] Speaker C: ಮ್ಯಾಮ್, ನೀವು ಈ ಫೋನ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಯಾರ ಜೊತೆ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ? [Ma'am, who are you talking to on this phone?] Speaker A: ನಾನು SpeakX ಆಪ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಇರೋ AI ಟೀಚರ್ ಜೊತೆ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀನಿ. ನಾನು ಇವರಿಂದ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿತಿದ್ದೀನಿ. [I am talking to the AI teacher in the SpeakX app. I am learning English from her.] Speaker C: ಓಹ್, ರಿಯಲ್ ಟೀಚರ್ ತರಾನಾ? [Oh, like a real teacher?] Speaker A: ಹೌದು, ಇದರಲ್ಲಿ AI ಟೀಚರ್ ಇದ್ದಾರೆ. ಇದು ನನಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋದು ಹೇಳಿಕೊಡುತ್ತೆ. ನಾನು ಏನು ಕೆಲಸ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀನಿ, ಇದನ್ನ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಹೇಗೆ ಹೇಳೋದು, ಈ ತರ ಸಿಂಪಲ್ ರೀತಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಹೇಳಿಕೊಡುತ್ತೆ. ಹೇಗೆ ಗೊತ್ತಾ? ನಿಮ್ಮ ಹತ್ರ ಫ್ರೆಶ್ ಕೊತ್ತಂಬರಿ ಸೊಪ್ಪು ಇದೆಯಾ? [Yes, there is an AI teacher in this. It teaches me how to speak English. Whatever work I am doing, how to say it in English, it teaches in a simple way like this. You know how? Do you have fresh coriander leaves?] Speaker B: Ask him, "Do you have fresh coriander today?" Speaker A: ನೋಡಿದ್ರಾ ಅಣ್ಣ, ಎಷ್ಟು ಈಜಿ ಇದೆ. ನಾನು ದಿನಾವರಿ 15 ರಿಂದ 20 ನಿಮಿಷ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ, ಅಷ್ಟೇ. [See brother, how easy it is. I practice 15 to 20 minutes daily, that's all.] Speaker C: ಇಷ್ಟು ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿ ಹೇಳಿಕೊಡ್ತಾ ಇದ್ದಾರೆ ಅಂದ್ರೆ ಫೀಸ್ ಕೂಡ ಜಾಸ್ತಿ ಇರಬೇಕಲ್ವಾ? [If they teach so well, the fees must also be high, right?] Speaker A: ಬರಿ ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ 2 ರೂಪಾಯಿ ಆಗುತ್ತೆ. 7 ದಿನದ ಟ್ರಯಲ್ ತಗೋಬಹುದು. ನಿಮ್ಮ ತರಕಾರಿ ಗಿಂತಾನೂ ಕಮ್ಮಿ ಇದೆ. [It costs only 2 rupees a day. You can take a 7-day trial. It's cheaper than your vegetables.] Speaker C: ಎಂತ ಸೂಪರ್ ಆಪ್! ಯಾರಾದ್ರೂ SpeakX ಆಪ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಬಹುದು ಮತ್ತೆ. [What a super app! Anyone can learn English on the SpeakX app then.]
on_screen_text:
Nange tomato rate kelabeku, idanna English alli heg kelthare? [I want to ask the price of tomatoes, how do they ask this in English?]
What is the price of tomatoes today?
Mam, neevu ee phone jote mathadthidira? [Ma'am, who are you talking to on this phone?]
Naanu SpeakX app alli iro AI teacher jote mathadthidini. [I am talking to the AI teacher in the SpeakX app.]
Naanu ivarinda kalithidini. [I am learning from her.]
Oh, real teacher thara na? [Oh, like a real teacher?]
Speak with AI TEACHER
Nimhatra fresh coriander ideya? [Do you have fresh coriander?]
Ask him, do you have fresh coriander today?
Nodidra anna, yeshtu easy ide. [See brother, how easy it is.]
Naanu dina vari 15-20 nimisha practice maadtini, ashte. [I practice 15-20 minutes daily, that's all.]
Istu chanage helkodtha idare andre fees kuda jasthi irbekalva? [If they teach so well, the fees must also be high, right?]
Bari dinakke Rs. 2 agatte. [It costs only Rs. 2 a day.]
thogonbodu, nim tharkari kintanu kammi ide. [You can take it, it's cheaper than your vegetables.]
Enta super app! [What a super app!]
Yaaradru SpeakX app alli English kallibodu matte. [Anyone can learn English on the SpeakX app then.]
Download SpeakX App
Start 7 Days Trial Now
summary: A woman in a grocery store uses the SpeakX app to translate Kannada phrases into English with an AI teacher. The shopkeeper is impressed by how easy and affordable it is, costing only 2 rupees a day. The ad ends with a call to action to download the app and start a 7-day trial.
